consensus_score.reasoning: Claude correctly identified this as an instructional video rather than an actual FLS task performance. The video contains educational content with titles and technical illustrations, not a timed performance. GPT-4o incorrectly scored this as a completed task with phases and penalties. Following the rubric requirement for actual task performance, this video cannot be scored as an FLS attempt.

disagreements.rationale: This is an instructional video, not an actual FLS task performance, so no completion time can be measured
